name: Value Driver Tree
description: A professional Value Driver Tree widget for financial planning and analysis

treeConfig.description: JSON string defining the tree structure (managed by the on-canvas builder)

accountDimension.description: ID of the Account dimension in the model

versionDimension.description: ID of the Version dimension in the model

ds1Version.description: Version member ID for Data Set 1 (primary/editable)

ds2Version.description: Version member ID for Data Set 2 (comparison/read-only)

defaultDisplay.description: Default display mode: 'year' (full year), 'month' (current month), or 'ytd' (year to date)

valueRows.description: JSON array of up to 4 value row definitions [{dataSet, timeVariant, label}]

measureDimValue.description: The @MeasureDimension value to use (e.g., Measure1). Auto-detected if empty.

timeDimension.description: ID of the Time/Date dimension in the model

timeHierarchy.description: Hierarchy ID for the Time dimension in the Table (e.g., YQM, YMD). Used to build full SAC member IDs for write-back.

timeGranularity.description: Time granularity: month, quarter, or year

nodeWidth.description: Width of each node tile in pixels

changedValues.description: JSON string of changed values for planning write-back (read-only, set by widget)

_writeBackTimes.description: Pipe-delimited time member IDs for write-back (index-aligned)

_writeBackVersion.description: The version ID used for write-back entries

_writeBackMeasureDim.description: The @MeasureDimension value for write-back selections (e.g., SignedData)

_writeBackAccountDim.description: The account dimension ID for write-back selections

_writeBackVersionDim.description: The version dimension ID for write-back selections

_writeBackTimeDim.description: The time dimension ID for write-back selections

_writeBackYear.description: The DS1 year for write-back filtering (e.g., 2017)

_writeBackDisplayMode.description: Display mode at write-back time: year, month, or ytd

getDataSource.description: Returns the data source for scripting

getDimensions.description: Returns available dimensions from the bound model

getMeasures.description: Returns available measures from the bound model

getMembers.description: Returns members of the specified dimension

getChangedValues.description: Returns JSON of all changed values for planning write-back

getWriteBackCount.description: Returns the number of pending write-back entries

getWriteBackAccount.description: Returns the account ID for the write-back entry at the given index

getWriteBackTime.description: Returns the time member ID for the write-back entry at the given index

getWriteBackValue.description: Returns the new value for the write-back entry at the given index

getWriteBackVersion.description: Returns the version ID for write-back

getWriteBackMeasureDim.description: Returns the @MeasureDimension value for write-back selections (e.g., SignedData)

getWriteBackAccountDim.description: Returns the account dimension name for write-back selections

getWriteBackVersionDim.description: Returns the version dimension name for write-back selections

getWriteBackTimeDim.description: Returns the time dimension name for write-back selections

getWriteBackYear.description: Returns the DS1 year for write-back filtering

getWriteBackDisplayMode.description: Returns the display mode at write-back time (year, month, ytd)

setTimeHierarchy.description: Sets the time hierarchy ID from the Table (e.g., YQM). Called by SAC script before write-back.

getTimeHierarchy.description: Returns the currently set time hierarchy ID

getTimeDimension.description: Returns the configured time dimension ID

getTreeConfig.description: Returns the current tree configuration JSON

onResultChanged.description: Called when the data binding result set changes

onSubmitPlanning.description: Fired when the user submits changed planning values

onNodeSelected.description: Fired when the user selects a node in the tree
